ascension.retireOrAscend: Retire and bank everything - or draft a mutator and ascend to depth {{depth}}.
ascension.ascendedLevelsInfo: Ascended levels are faster and count {{multiplier}}× toward Certificate Hours.
ascension.noMutators: No mutators available - mutators.yml failed to load. You can still retire below.
ascension.tutorialIntro1: You beat every level - but the grind never ends. Ascend to start over at level 1 with your score, upgrades and lives intact, plus one
ascension.tutorialIntro2: : a curse bundled with a blessing. Mutators stack with every ascension, levels get faster, and each cleared level counts more toward Certificate Hours. Retire whenever you want to bank it all.

bottomBarDetails.ballSpeedDescBase: Effective multiplier on ball velocity. Base: {{base}}
bottomBarDetails.ballSpeedDescMicro_one: . MicroManager applies an additional {{reduction}}% reduction from {{count}} locked ball
bottomBarDetails.ballSpeedDescMicro_other: . MicroManager applies an additional {{reduction}}% reduction from {{count}} locked balls
bottomBarDetails.ballSpeedDescTail: . Slower balls give you more reaction time when drawing fences.
bottomBarDetails.ballSizeDesc: Radius multiplier applied to every ball. Larger balls are harder to dodge when drawing a fence - but also cover more of the board for locking purposes.
bottomBarDetails.fenceSpeedDesc: How quickly your fence grows after you start drawing. Higher fence speed shortens the window a ball has to collide with your in-progress fence, making cuts safer.
bottomBarDetails.scoreMultiplierDesc: Global multiplier applied to all points earned this run. Stacks multiplicatively with per-cut par bonuses.
bottomBarDetails.instantFencesActive_one: {{count}} fence is automatically completed at the start of each level, capturing territory without any risk.
bottomBarDetails.instantFencesActive_other: {{count}} fences are automatically completed at the start of each level, capturing territory without any risk.
bottomBarDetails.instantFencesInactive: No instant fences active. Purchase upgrades to gain free fences each level.
bottomBarDetails.concurrentFencesActive: You can draw {{total}} fences simultaneously. Extra concurrent fences let you cut from multiple walls at once.
bottomBarDetails.concurrentFencesInactive: Default: 1 active fence at a time.
bottomBarDetails.bonusRemovalActive: Each successful cut has a {{chance}} chance to strip {{amount}} of a ball's accumulated speed bonus, gradually nudging fast balls back toward their base speed.
bottomBarDetails.extraLivesActive_one: +{{count}} additional starting live added at the start of every run. More lives means more chances to recover from a bad cut.
bottomBarDetails.extraLivesActive_other: +{{count}} additional starting lives added at the start of every run. More lives means more chances to recover from a bad cut.
bottomBarDetails.scoreInterestActive: At the end of each level, {{rate}} of your current total score is added as a bonus. Higher accumulated scores compound faster.
bottomBarDetails.extraShopSlotsActive_one: {{count}} extra item appears in the upgrade shop between levels, giving you more choices each visit.
bottomBarDetails.extraShopSlotsActive_other: {{count}} extra items appear in the upgrade shop between levels, giving you more choices each visit.
bottomBarDetails.shopRestocksActive_one: Your first purchase per shop visit each add a fresh offer to the shelf (Procurement).
bottomBarDetails.shopRestocksActive_other: Your first {{count}} purchases per shop visit each add a fresh offer to the shelf (Procurement).
bottomBarDetails.microManagerActive_one: Each locked ball reduces ball speed by {{percent}}% (stacks multiplicatively, down to a 50% floor). Right now {{count}} ball locked → effective speed {{speed}}.
bottomBarDetails.microManagerActive_other: Each locked ball reduces ball speed by {{percent}}% (stacks multiplicatively, down to a 50% floor). Right now {{count}} balls locked → effective speed {{speed}}.
bottomBarDetails.ballPathPredictionActive: Draws a predicted trajectory {{bounceText}} ahead for the {{target}}. Helps you time fences to avoid collisions.
bottomBarDetails.noModifiers: No modifiers active yet. Purchase upgrades between levels to gain power-ups for your run.

certificateStore.unlockUpgradeChain: Buy the {{upgradeName}} upgrade in {{required}} different runs.
certificateStore.unlockHoursSpent: Spend {{required}} Certificate Hours in this store (on any certificates).
certificateStore.title: CERTIFICATES
certificateStore.tutorialBody: Unlock permanent bonuses by mastering upgrade families across multiple runs. Each certificate has levels you can purchase with Certificate Hours earned during gameplay.

game.moverTutorialBody:
Orange obstacles move back and forth on a fixed track.

Balls bounce off them - but if your growing fence touches one, you lose a life.

Watch the track lines and time your fences carefully!
game.breakTutorialBody:
Amber blocks can be smashed for bonus overtime - guide balls into them until they shatter, and anything stacked on top falls with them.

You still win the normal way, by shrinking the board; breaking is just extra points.

You can't fence against a breakable (the cut fizzles), and the black ball breaks things in half the hits.
game.infoPanelsTutorialBody:
The status bars are expandable!

Tap the TOP BAR to see full level details, all your active upgrades with descriptions, and certificate-hour progress.

Tap the BOTTOM BAR to view every active modifier explained in plain language.

interactiveTutorial.dragInstruction: Drag anywhere inside the area to create a slicing wall. Don't let the ball hit the wall while it's growing!

options.title: OPTIONS
options.resetConfirmBody: This will reset your score balance and all owned certificates. This action cannot be undone.

pushYourLuck.noRisk: No risk - you keep your score if you fail!

topBarDetails.territoryGoalPending: Capture at least {{required}}% of the board. Currently at {{remaining}}% - need {{more}}% more.
topBarDetails.cutsOverPar_one: Over par by {{count}} cut. Score multiplier is reduced when exceeding par.
topBarDetails.cutsOverPar_other: Over par by {{count}} cuts. Score multiplier is reduced when exceeding par.
topBarDetails.cutsParInfo: Par is {{par}} cuts. Staying within par gives a score bonus.
topBarDetails.cutsRemaining_one: {{count}} cut remaining before par. Great work!
topBarDetails.cutsRemaining_other: {{count}} cuts remaining before par. Great work!
topBarDetails.lockObjectiveMet: Lock objective met! {{locked}} of {{required}} balls locked.
topBarDetails.lockObjectivePending: Lock {{required}} balls by trapping them with fences. {{more}} more needed.
topBarDetails.lockNoneRequiredWithLocks_one: {{count}} ball locked. No lock requirement this level.
topBarDetails.lockNoneRequiredWithLocks_other: {{count}} balls locked. No lock requirement this level.
topBarDetails.lockNoneRequired: No thread lock requirement this level.
topBarDetails.livesDescription: You lose a life when a ball hits your fence while it is growing. Run out of lives and you can spend a Continue to retry the level.
topBarDetails.continuesDescription: Run out of lives and a Continue lets you retry this level with your overtime and upgrades intact. Earn more through certificates.
topBarDetails.certPointsToGo_one: Complete {{count}} more level to earn the next cert point and unlock upgrades in the Certificate Store.
topBarDetails.certPointsToGo_other: Complete {{count}} more levels to earn the next cert point and unlock upgrades in the Certificate Store.
topBarDetails.ascensionDescription: You looped past the final level. Balls are faster, every drafted mutator below is active, and each completed level counts {{multiplier}}× toward Certificate Hours.
topBarDetails.noUpgrades: No upgrades purchased yet. Visit the upgrade shop between levels to power up your run.

tutorial.achievementsCertificatesBody: Play more to unlock achievements and certificates. Achievements reward lifetime milestones with permanent run bonuses. Certificates are earned by mastering specific upgrades across multiple runs and can be purchased in the Certificate Store for lasting effects.
tutorial.controlSecondFinger: Second finger while fence is growing cancels it

ballTypes.title: Ball Types
ballTypes.intro: A ball's colour tells you what it does. Which balls appear is decided by the level you've reached - new colours unlock as you climb.

swipeToCut.title: Swipe to Cut
swipeToCut.description: Swipe or drag to create a slicing wall. Horizontal or vertical based on your swipe direction.

removeEmptySpace.title: Remove Empty Space
removeEmptySpace.description: When the wall completes, the side WITHOUT the ball is removed and becomes darkness.

avoidTheBall.title: Avoid the Ball
avoidTheBall.description: Don't let the ball hit the wall while it's still growing - instant game over!

winCondition.title: Win Condition
winCondition.description: Reduce the arena below the level's target size to win. Trap a ball in a small enough region and it locks away for a bonus!

breakObstacles.title: Breaking Obstacles
breakObstacles.description: Later levels add amber breakable blocks. Guide balls into them to smash them for bonus overtime - stacked pieces fall when their support breaks. You still win by shrinking the board; breaking is extra. You can't fence against a breakable (it fizzles), and the black ball breaks things in half the hits.

lives.title: Lives
lives.description: You start each run with a set number of lives. Lose a life every time a ball hits your growing fence. Run out of lives and the run ends.

checkpoints.title: Checkpoints
checkpoints.description: Every 5 levels is a checkpoint. When your run ends, your next run always restarts from the highest checkpoint you reached - you never lose all your progress.

headStartCertificates.title: Head Start Certificates
headStartCertificates.description: In the Certificate Store you can unlock Head Start certificates that permanently raise your starting level - so experienced players never have to replay early levels.

tutorialOverlay.replayFromOptions: Tutorials can be replayed from OPTIONS

upgradeShop.restocksLeft: Restocks left: {{count}} - buying an item adds a new offer
upgradeShop.holdHint: Hold an upgrade to see its track
upgradeShop.tutorialBody: Spend overtime hours on upgrades after each map. Overtime upgrades multiply future earnings. Effects appear in the bottom bar on the next map. Press and hold any upgrade for more info - including what unlocks it and what it unlocks.

runDraft.title: Sprint Planning
runDraft.subtitle: Pick a loadout to shape this run from level 1.
runDraft.pickHint: Each loadout pairs a curse with a blessing. Choose one, or skip to play it straight.

continue.title: Continue?
continue.body_one: Spend 1 Continue to retry this level with your overtime and upgrades intact. {{count}} left.
continue.body_other: Spend 1 Continue to retry this level with your overtime and upgrades intact. {{count}} left.

welcome.certLockedBody:
Certificates are permanent bonuses you earn by mastering upgrade families across multiple runs.

Reach the top tier of an upgrade family, or unlock your first certificate by playing, and this store opens up.

Then spend Certificate Hours (earned every 5 levels you complete) to level certificates up for lasting effects.
